required_operator_inputs: manual finding capture must preserve the camera framing the operator sees
high resolution capture behavior must remain high resolution
wide viewport aspect must not clip left and right sides during capture
no physical mouse automation may be introduced
viewport preview downscale must require measured slow-frame evidence instead of triggering from unknown timing alone
active preview recovery must be stable when debounce is needed and must satisfy the repo code-quality baseline
focused pacing tests must be runnable through the checked-in native helper harness
Capture Finding must render through the standard float64 tier even when the live viewport is using fast float32
live viewport pacing must use measured non-benchmark frame time so slow interaction actually enters preview
forbidden_operator_prompts: replace the renderer or camera model for this slice
change capture to low resolution to avoid the mismatch
use OS cursor automation as proof
widen into unrelated QoL, color-pipeline, or fractal parameter work

required_acceptance_assertions.description: The capture finding aspect/camera contract validates successfully
The capture finding aspect/camera phased plan remains synchronized
